OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: To delete the PNC, CPA and PCA, from Contract Summary,enabling soft delete for cloned client contract PCA record
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: SpecifyRatesDeletePCAandCPA

omniProcessElements.name: RA_Result
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "customError" : "=IF(%DeleteObject% == \"PNC\" && %SV_ForPNC:pncCount% <= 1, $Vlocity.TRUE, $Vlocity.FALSE)", "errorMessage" : "=IF(%DeleteObject% == \"PNC\" && %SV_ForPNC:pncCount% <= 1, \"A contract must have at least one facility\", \"\")" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: UpdatePCARecord
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "PCARecord" : "%RecordId%", "MarkForDelete" : true }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRPUpdatePCA", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DEL_ChildCPAs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DeleteObject% == \"PNC\" && %SV_ForPNC:pncCount% > 1 && %SV_ForPNC:cpaCount% > 0", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ContractPaymentAgreement", "Id" : "%SV_ForPNC:cpaIds%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DEL_PNCRecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%SV_ForPNC:pncCount% > 1", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ProviderNetworkContract", "Id" : "%RecordId%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_ForPNC
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "pncCount" : "=COUNTQUERY (\"SELECT COUNT() FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE ContractId = '{0}'\" , %ContractId%)", "cpaIds" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT Id from ContractPaymentAgreement where ContractId ='{0}' AND Provider_Network_Contract__c ='{1}'\",%ContractId%, %RecordId%)", "cpaCount" : "=COUNTQUERY(\"SELECT COUNT() from ContractPaymentAgreement where ContractId ='{0}' AND Provider_Network_Contract__c ='{1}'\",%ContractId%, %RecordId%)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Del_CPARecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DeleteObject% == \"CPA\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ContractPaymentAgreement", "Id" : "%RecordId%", "AllOrNone" : true } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Del_PCARecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DeleteObject% == \"PCA\" && %IsClonedClientContract% !=true", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "PreventiveCareAgreement", "Id" : "%RecordId%", "AllOrNone" : true } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
